subcodes.first_line: God calleth to remembrance His servants who believed in their All-Merciful Lord on a Day when the heavens lamented and the tribes were in turmoil [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الله عباده الذین آمنوا بربهم الرحمن فی یوم ناحت السما و اضطربت قبائل
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @chastisement and requital, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
